name: Andouille and Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Audouille - or other heavily smoked sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the bacon drippings in a large, heavy saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Saute the onions, bell pepper, and parsley, stirring occasionally until the onions are clear.
3. Add the wine, garlic, soy sauce, and andouille to the pan; mix well.
4. Stir in the salt and hot sauce.
5. Add the potatoes, stir, cover, reduce the heat to low, and simmer, stirring occasionally until the potatoes are tender (about 30 minutes).
